ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the city */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Overall poverty rate of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for city data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year name */,
  "is_current_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is the current year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for year data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, policymaker) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "issues" TEXT /* Any issues found during the quality check */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes related to the quality check */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the quality log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the revision */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was approved */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the revision log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_revisions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
